# Histórico
HISTFILE="$HOME/.zsh_history"
HISTSIZE=50000
SAVEHIST=50000
setopt EXTENDED_HISTORY INC_APPEND_HISTORY_TIME SHARE_HISTORY
setopt HIST_EXPIRE_DUPS_FIRST HIST_IGNORE_DUPS HIST_IGNORE_ALL_DUPS
setopt HIST_IGNORE_SPACE HIST_VERIFY HIST_REDUCE_BLANKS

# Setas filtram histórico
autoload -U up-line-or-beginning-search down-line-or-beginning-search
zle -N up-line-or-beginning-search
zle -N down-line-or-beginning-search
bindkey "${terminfo[kcuu1]:-^[[A}" up-line-or-beginning-search
bindkey "${terminfo[kcud1]:-^[[B}" down-line-or-beginning-search

export PATH=~/bin:$PATH
export PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH
export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH

# Docker
export PATH=$HOME/.docker/bin:$PATH

# Java
export JAVA_HOME=/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/zulu-17.jdk/Contents/Home

# Go
export GOPATH=~/go

# Android
export ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/emulator
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/tools
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/tools/bin
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools

# Python
export PATH="/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.13/bin:$PATH"
alias python="python3"
alias pip="pip3"

# ANTLR
export CLASSPATH=".:/usr/local/lib/antlr-4.13.2-complete.jar:$CLASSPATH"
alias grun='java org.antlr.v4.gui.TestRig'

# NVM
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion"

# PNPM
export PNPM_HOME="/Users/anotonio.silva/Library/pnpm"
case ":$PATH:" in
  *":$PNPM_HOME:"*) ;;
  *) export PATH="$PNPM_HOME:$PATH" ;;
esac

# Bun
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"
[ -s "$HOME/.bun/_bun" ] && source "$HOME/.bun/_bun"

# Deno
. "$HOME/.deno/env"

# Cargo/Rust
. "$HOME/.cargo/env"

# rbenv (skip in IDE environment reader)
if [[ -z "$INTELLIJ_ENVIRONMENT_READER" ]]; then
  eval "$(rbenv init - --no-rehash zsh)"
fi

# Aliases
alias reload="source ~/.zshrc"
alias zshrc="idea ~/.zshrc"
alias w="webstorm"
alias t="idea /tmp/tmp.txt"
alias e="idea"
alias i="pm install"
alias z="cd ~/dev/zazcart && idea . && pnpm run dev"
alias zazcart="cd ~/dev/zazcart"
alias sshk0="ssh-add -D && ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 && git config --global user.name 'antoniopresto' && git config --global user.email antoniopresto@gmail.com"
alias sshk1="ssh-add -D && ssh-add ~/.ssh/key1_rsa && git config --global user.name 'Merisio' && git config --global user.email 'contatomerisio2@gmail.com'"
alias tbl="cd ~/dev/tblv3-api && idea . && DEBUG_POSTHOG=1 NO_MONGO_LOG=1 yarn dev"
alias tblf="cd ~/dev/front-tblv3 && idea . && yarn dev-https"
alias intellicache="open ~/Library/Application\ Support/JetBrains/"
alias g="gemini --model gemini-3-pro-preview"
alias c="claude --debug --verbose"
alias ci="claude --debug --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions --chrome"

# ls aliases
alias ll='ls -lh'
alias la='ls -lha'
alias l='ls -1A'

# functions
echopm(){
    local dir=${1:-$(pwd)}
    if [[ -f "$dir/package-lock.json" ]]; then
       echo "npm"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/bun.lockb" ]]; then
       echo "bun"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/yarn.lock" ]]; then
       echo "yarn"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/pnpm-lock.yaml" ]]; then
       echo "pnpm"
    fi
}

pm() {
  local pmResult=""
  local pmPath=$(pwd)
  local pmNextPath=$pmPath

  for i in {0..2}; do
    pmResult=$(echopm "$pmNextPath")
    if [[ $pmResult != "" ]]; then
        command $pmResult "$@"
        return 0;
    fi
    pmNextPath=$(dirname "$pmNextPath")
  done
  return 1
}

gitreset() {
  git add .
  COMMIT_SUCCESS=false
  if git commit -m 'temp' --no-verify; then
    COMMIT_SUCCESS=true
  fi
  git clean -fdx -e .idea
  if [ "$COMMIT_SUCCESS" = true ]; then
    git reset --soft HEAD~1
  fi
  rm -rf pnpm-lock.yaml
  rm -rf bun.lockb
  rm -rf yarn.lock
}

root() {
  local pmResult=""
  local pmPath=$(pwd)
  local pmNextPath=$pmPath

  for i in {0..7}; do
    pmResult=$(echopm "$pmNextPath")
    if [[ $pmResult != "" ]]; then
        cd $pmNextPath
        return 0
    fi
    pmNextPath=$(dirname "$pmNextPath")
  done
  return 1
}

# overload git command
git () {
    if [[ $1 == "backup" ]]; then
        shift

        # Skip interactive prompts in IDE environment reader
        if [[ -n "$INTELLIJ_ENVIRONMENT_READER" ]]; then
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null "$@"
            return
        fi

        echo -n "Descrição do backup: "
        read description

        if [[ -z "$description" ]]; then
            echo "Erro: descrição é obrigatória."
            return 1
        fi

        local sanitized_description
        sanitized_description=$(echo "$description" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//')

        local original_branch
        original_branch=$(command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch --show-current)

        local timestamp
        timestamp=$(date +'%Y-%m-%d-%H-%M-%S')

        local backup_branch="${original_branch}-backup-${sanitized_description}-${timestamp}"

        if [[ -z $(command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null status --porcelain) ]]; then
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch "${backup_branch}"
            echo "Restore point created on clean branch: ${backup_branch}"
        else
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null add .
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null commit -m "backup: ${description}"
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch "${backup_branch}"
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null reset --soft HEAD~1
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null reset HEAD .
            echo "\nBackup created at: ${backup_branch}"
        fi
    else
        command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null "$@"
    fi
}

# basic zsh completions
autoload -Uz compinit && compinit

# Docker completions
fpath=($HOME/.docker/completions $fpath)

# Deno completions
if [[ ":$FPATH:" != *":$HOME/.zsh/completions:"* ]]; then
  export FPATH="$HOME/.zsh/completions:$FPATH"
fi

# Starship prompt
eval "$(starship init zsh)"

# Plugins (syntax-highlighting deve ser o último)
#source ~/.zsh/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions/zsh-autosuggestions.zsh
#source ~/.zsh/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting/zsh-syntax-highlighting.zsh

Agora tenho uma visão completa. Vou criar o plano para corrigir o autocomplete do zsh. O problema provavelmente é que:

1. O `compinit` está sendo carregado DEPOIS de adicionar os diretórios ao `fpath`, então as completions podem não estar sendo carregadas corretamente
2. A ordem no `.zshrc` está errada - o `compinit` deveria ser chamado DEPOIS de configurar todos os `fpath`

Vou apresentar o plano para o usuário.

content.text:
## Diagnóstico Completo

**Ambiente:**
- zsh 5.9 no macOS (Darwin 25.1.0)
- Starship prompt ativo
- oh-my-zsh não instalado
- Plugins `zsh-autosuggestions` e `zsh-syntax-highlighting` estão **comentados** (desativados)

**Problema Identificado:**

No seu `.zshrc`, a ordem das configurações está incorreta. O `compinit` está sendo chamado **antes** de adicionar os diretórios de completions ao `fpath`:

```zsh
# basic zsh completions
autoload -Uz compinit && compinit   # <-- Executado aqui

# Docker completions
fpath=($HOME/.docker/completions $fpath)  # <-- Adicionado DEPOIS

# Deno completions
if [[ ":$FPATH:" != *":$HOME/.zsh/completions:"* ]]; then
  export FPATH="$HOME/.zsh/completions:$FPATH"  # <-- Adicionado DEPOIS
fi
```

---

## Plano de Correção

1. **Reorganizar o `.zshrc`** - Mover todas as configurações de `fpath` para **ANTES** do `compinit`

2. **Garantir que as opções de completion estejam configuradas** - Adicionar configurações para melhorar o comportamento do Tab completion:
   - Menu de seleção com Tab
   - Case-insensitive matching
   - Highlight da seleção atual

3. **Limpar cache de completions** - Remover o arquivo `.zcompdump` para forçar reconstrução

4. **Testar** - Recarregar o shell e verificar se Tab completion funciona

---

**Aguardo seu OK para executar.**

content.thinking:
O usuário tem duas perguntas:
1. Se é necessário limpar o histórico - ele está confundindo `.zcompdump` com `.zsh_history`. Preciso esclarecer que NÃO vou mexer no histórico dele.
2. O que é `fpath` - preciso explicar de forma simples.

content.text:
## Esclarecimentos

**Sobre o histórico:** Não vou tocar no seu histórico de comandos. O arquivo que precisa ser removido é o `.zcompdump`, que é apenas um **cache de completions** - nada a ver com o histórico. Seu `.zsh_history` permanece intacto.

**O que é `fpath`:**

`fpath` (function path) é uma variável do zsh que lista diretórios onde ele procura por:
- Funções autoload
- **Arquivos de completion** (os arquivos `_comando` que definem o que aparece quando você aperta Tab)

# Histórico
HISTFILE="$HOME/.zsh_history"
HISTSIZE=50000
SAVEHIST=50000
setopt EXTENDED_HISTORY INC_APPEND_HISTORY_TIME SHARE_HISTORY
setopt HIST_EXPIRE_DUPS_FIRST HIST_IGNORE_DUPS HIST_IGNORE_ALL_DUPS
setopt HIST_IGNORE_SPACE HIST_VERIFY HIST_REDUCE_BLANKS

# Setas filtram histórico
autoload -U up-line-or-beginning-search down-line-or-beginning-search
zle -N up-line-or-beginning-search
zle -N down-line-or-beginning-search
bindkey "${terminfo[kcuu1]:-^[[A}" up-line-or-beginning-search
bindkey "${terminfo[kcud1]:-^[[B}" down-line-or-beginning-search

export PATH=~/bin:$PATH
export PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH
export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH

# Docker
export PATH=$HOME/.docker/bin:$PATH

# Java
export JAVA_HOME=/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/zulu-17.jdk/Contents/Home

# Go
export GOPATH=~/go

# Android
export ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/emulator
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/tools
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/tools/bin
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools

# Python
export PATH="/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.13/bin:$PATH"
alias python="python3"
alias pip="pip3"

# ANTLR
export CLASSPATH=".:/usr/local/lib/antlr-4.13.2-complete.jar:$CLASSPATH"
alias grun='java org.antlr.v4.gui.TestRig'

# NVM
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion"

# PNPM
export PNPM_HOME="/Users/anotonio.silva/Library/pnpm"
case ":$PATH:" in
  *":$PNPM_HOME:"*) ;;
  *) export PATH="$PNPM_HOME:$PATH" ;;
esac

# Bun
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"
[ -s "$HOME/.bun/_bun" ] && source "$HOME/.bun/_bun"

# Deno
. "$HOME/.deno/env"

# Cargo/Rust
. "$HOME/.cargo/env"

# rbenv (skip in IDE environment reader)
if [[ -z "$INTELLIJ_ENVIRONMENT_READER" ]]; then
  eval "$(rbenv init - --no-rehash zsh)"
fi

# Aliases
alias reload="source ~/.zshrc"
alias zshrc="idea ~/.zshrc"
alias w="webstorm"
alias t="idea /tmp/tmp.txt"
alias e="idea"
alias i="pm install"
alias z="cd ~/dev/zazcart && idea . && pnpm run dev"
alias zazcart="cd ~/dev/zazcart"
alias sshk0="ssh-add -D && ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 && git config --global user.name 'antoniopresto' && git config --global user.email antoniopresto@gmail.com"
alias sshk1="ssh-add -D && ssh-add ~/.ssh/key1_rsa && git config --global user.name 'Merisio' && git config --global user.email 'contatomerisio2@gmail.com'"
alias tbl="cd ~/dev/tblv3-api && idea . && DEBUG_POSTHOG=1 NO_MONGO_LOG=1 yarn dev"
alias tblf="cd ~/dev/front-tblv3 && idea . && yarn dev-https"
alias intellicache="open ~/Library/Application\ Support/JetBrains/"
alias g="gemini --model gemini-3-pro-preview"
alias c="claude --debug --verbose"
alias ci="claude --debug --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions --chrome"

# ls aliases
alias ll='ls -lh'
alias la='ls -lha'
alias l='ls -1A'

# functions
echopm(){
    local dir=${1:-$(pwd)}
    if [[ -f "$dir/package-lock.json" ]]; then
       echo "npm"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/bun.lockb" ]]; then
       echo "bun"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/yarn.lock" ]]; then
       echo "yarn"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/pnpm-lock.yaml" ]]; then
       echo "pnpm"
    fi
}

pm() {
  local pmResult=""
  local pmPath=$(pwd)
  local pmNextPath=$pmPath

  for i in {0..2}; do
    pmResult=$(echopm "$pmNextPath")
    if [[ $pmResult != "" ]]; then
        command $pmResult "$@"
        return 0;
    fi
    pmNextPath=$(dirname "$pmNextPath")
  done
  return 1
}

gitreset() {
  git add .
  COMMIT_SUCCESS=false
  if git commit -m 'temp' --no-verify; then
    COMMIT_SUCCESS=true
  fi
  git clean -fdx -e .idea
  if [ "$COMMIT_SUCCESS" = true ]; then
    git reset --soft HEAD~1
  fi
  rm -rf pnpm-lock.yaml
  rm -rf bun.lockb
  rm -rf yarn.lock
}

root() {
  local pmResult=""
  local pmPath=$(pwd)
  local pmNextPath=$pmPath

  for i in {0..7}; do
    pmResult=$(echopm "$pmNextPath")
    if [[ $pmResult != "" ]]; then
        cd $pmNextPath
        return 0
    fi
    pmNextPath=$(dirname "$pmNextPath")
  done
  return 1
}

# overload git command
git () {
    if [[ $1 == "backup" ]]; then
        shift

        # Skip interactive prompts in IDE environment reader
        if [[ -n "$INTELLIJ_ENVIRONMENT_READER" ]]; then
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null "$@"
            return
        fi

        echo -n "Descrição do backup: "
        read description

        if [[ -z "$description" ]]; then
            echo "Erro: descrição é obrigatória."
            return 1
        fi

        local sanitized_description
        sanitized_description=$(echo "$description" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//')

        local original_branch
        original_branch=$(command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch --show-current)

        local timestamp
        timestamp=$(date +'%Y-%m-%d-%H-%M-%S')

        local backup_branch="${original_branch}-backup-${sanitized_description}-${timestamp}"

        if [[ -z $(command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null status --porcelain) ]]; then
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch "${backup_branch}"
            echo "Restore point created on clean branch: ${backup_branch}"
        else
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null add .
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null commit -m "backup: ${description}"
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch "${backup_branch}"
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null reset --soft HEAD~1
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null reset HEAD .
            echo "\nBackup created at: ${backup_branch}"
        fi
    else
        command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null "$@"
    fi
}

# basic zsh completions
autoload -Uz compinit && compinit

# Docker completions
fpath=($HOME/.docker/completions $fpath)

# Deno completions
if [[ ":$FPATH:" != *":$HOME/.zsh/completions:"* ]]; then
  export FPATH="$HOME/.zsh/completions:$FPATH"
fi

# Starship prompt
eval "$(starship init zsh)"

# Plugins (syntax-highlighting deve ser o último)
#source ~/.zsh/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions/zsh-autosuggestions.zsh
#source ~/.zsh/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting/zsh-syntax-highlighting.zsh

HISTFILE="$HOME/.zsh_history"
HISTSIZE=50000
SAVEHIST=50000
setopt EXTENDED_HISTORY INC_APPEND_HISTORY_TIME SHARE_HISTORY
setopt HIST_EXPIRE_DUPS_FIRST HIST_IGNORE_DUPS HIST_IGNORE_ALL_DUPS
setopt HIST_IGNORE_SPACE HIST_VERIFY HIST_REDUCE_BLANKS

# Setas filtram histórico
autoload -U up-line-or-beginning-search down-line-or-beginning-search
zle -N up-line-or-beginning-search
zle -N down-line-or-beginning-search
bindkey "${terminfo[kcuu1]:-^[[A}" up-line-or-beginning-search
bindkey "${terminfo[kcud1]:-^[[B}" down-line-or-beginning-search

export PATH=~/bin:$PATH
export PATH=/usr/local/bin:$PATH
export PATH=$HOME/.local/bin:$PATH

# Docker
export PATH=$HOME/.docker/bin:$PATH

# Java
export JAVA_HOME=/Library/Java/JavaVirtualMachines/zulu-17.jdk/Contents/Home

# Go
export GOPATH=~/go

# Android
export ANDROID_HOME=$HOME/Library/Android/sdk
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/emulator
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/tools
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/tools/bin
export PATH=$PATH:$ANDROID_HOME/platform-tools

# Python
export PATH="/Library/Frameworks/Python.framework/Versions/3.13/bin:$PATH"
alias python="python3"
alias pip="pip3"

# ANTLR
export CLASSPATH=".:/usr/local/lib/antlr-4.13.2-complete.jar:$CLASSPATH"
alias grun='java org.antlr.v4.gui.TestRig'

# NVM
export NVM_DIR="$HOME/.nvm"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/nvm.sh"
[ -s "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion" ] && \. "$NVM_DIR/bash_completion"

# PNPM
export PNPM_HOME="/Users/anotonio.silva/Library/pnpm"
case ":$PATH:" in
  *":$PNPM_HOME:"*) ;;
  *) export PATH="$PNPM_HOME:$PATH" ;;
esac

# Bun
export BUN_INSTALL="$HOME/.bun"
export PATH="$BUN_INSTALL/bin:$PATH"
[ -s "$HOME/.bun/_bun" ] && source "$HOME/.bun/_bun"

# Deno
. "$HOME/.deno/env"

# Cargo/Rust
. "$HOME/.cargo/env"

# rbenv (skip in IDE environment reader)
if [[ -z "$INTELLIJ_ENVIRONMENT_READER" ]]; then
  eval "$(rbenv init - --no-rehash zsh)"
fi

# Aliases
alias reload="source ~/.zshrc"
alias zshrc="idea ~/.zshrc"
alias w="webstorm"
alias t="idea /tmp/tmp.txt"
alias e="idea"
alias i="pm install"
alias z="cd ~/dev/zazcart && idea . && pnpm run dev"
alias zazcart="cd ~/dev/zazcart"
alias sshk0="ssh-add -D && ssh-add ~/.ssh/id_ed25519 && git config --global user.name 'antoniopresto' && git config --global user.email antoniopresto@gmail.com"
alias sshk1="ssh-add -D && ssh-add ~/.ssh/key1_rsa && git config --global user.name 'Merisio' && git config --global user.email 'contatomerisio2@gmail.com'"
alias tbl="cd ~/dev/tblv3-api && idea . && DEBUG_POSTHOG=1 NO_MONGO_LOG=1 yarn dev"
alias tblf="cd ~/dev/front-tblv3 && idea . && yarn dev-https"
alias intellicache="open ~/Library/Application\ Support/JetBrains/"
alias g="gemini --model gemini-3-pro-preview"
alias c="claude --debug --verbose"
alias ci="claude --debug --verbose --dangerously-skip-permissions --chrome"

# ls aliases
alias ll='ls -lh'
alias la='ls -lha'
alias l='ls -1A'

# functions
echopm(){
    local dir=${1:-$(pwd)}
    if [[ -f "$dir/package-lock.json" ]]; then
       echo "npm"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/bun.lockb" ]]; then
       echo "bun"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/yarn.lock" ]]; then
       echo "yarn"
    elif [[ -f "$dir/pnpm-lock.yaml" ]]; then
       echo "pnpm"
    fi
}

pm() {
  local pmResult=""
  local pmPath=$(pwd)
  local pmNextPath=$pmPath

  for i in {0..2}; do
    pmResult=$(echopm "$pmNextPath")
    if [[ $pmResult != "" ]]; then
        command $pmResult "$@"
        return 0;
    fi
    pmNextPath=$(dirname "$pmNextPath")
  done
  return 1
}

gitreset() {
  git add .
  COMMIT_SUCCESS=false
  if git commit -m 'temp' --no-verify; then
    COMMIT_SUCCESS=true
  fi
  git clean -fdx -e .idea
  if [ "$COMMIT_SUCCESS" = true ]; then
    git reset --soft HEAD~1
  fi
  rm -rf pnpm-lock.yaml
  rm -rf bun.lockb
  rm -rf yarn.lock
}

root() {
  local pmResult=""
  local pmPath=$(pwd)
  local pmNextPath=$pmPath

  for i in {0..7}; do
    pmResult=$(echopm "$pmNextPath")
    if [[ $pmResult != "" ]]; then
        cd $pmNextPath
        return 0
    fi
    pmNextPath=$(dirname "$pmNextPath")
  done
  return 1
}

# overload git command
git () {
    if [[ $1 == "backup" ]]; then
        shift

        # Skip interactive prompts in IDE environment reader
        if [[ -n "$INTELLIJ_ENVIRONMENT_READER" ]]; then
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null "$@"
            return
        fi

        echo -n "Descrição do backup: "
        read description

        if [[ -z "$description" ]]; then
            echo "Erro: descrição é obrigatória."
            return 1
        fi

        local sanitized_description
        sanitized_description=$(echo "$description" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//')

        local original_branch
        original_branch=$(command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch --show-current)

        local timestamp
        timestamp=$(date +'%Y-%m-%d-%H-%M-%S')

        local backup_branch="${original_branch}-backup-${sanitized_description}-${timestamp}"

        if [[ -z $(command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null status --porcelain) ]]; then
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch "${backup_branch}"
            echo "Restore point created on clean branch: ${backup_branch}"
        else
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null add .
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null commit -m "backup: ${description}"
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch "${backup_branch}"
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null reset --soft HEAD~1
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null reset HEAD .
            echo "\nBackup created at: ${backup_branch}"
        fi
    else
        command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null "$@"
    fi
}

# basic zsh completions
autoload -Uz compinit && compinit

# Docker completions
fpath=($HOME/.docker/completions $fpath)

# Deno completions
if [[ ":$FPATH:" != *":$HOME/.zsh/completions:"* ]]; then
  export FPATH="$HOME/.zsh/completions:$FPATH"
fi

# Starship prompt
eval "$(starship init zsh)"

# Plugins (syntax-highlighting deve ser o último)
#source ~/.zsh/plugins/zsh-autosuggestions/zsh-autosuggestions.zsh
#source ~/.zsh/plugins/zsh-syntax-highlighting/zsh-syntax-highlighting.zsh

content.text:
## O que fiz:

1. **Reorganizei a ordem no `.zshrc`** - O `compinit` (que inicializa o sistema de completions) estava sendo chamado **antes** de adicionar os diretórios ao `fpath`. Invertendo a ordem, o zsh encontra os arquivos de completion.

2. **Corrigi os keybindings das setas** - Os códigos de tecla `${terminfo[...]}` não estavam funcionando no seu terminal. Substituí por códigos fixos (`^[[A`, `^[OA`) que funcionam em qualquer terminal macOS.

3. **Adicionei configurações de completion** - Case-insensitive, cores, e `MENU_COMPLETE` (Tab cicla inline).

## Sobre o Starship:

**Não tem relação.** O Starship é só o **prompt** (a aparência da linha onde você digita, com ícones, branch do git, etc).

O problema era puramente de **configuração do zsh** - ordem errada e keybindings incompatíveis. Seria necessário corrigir com ou sem Starship.

O usuário está perguntando se é possível customizar o prompt do zsh sem usar o Starship, apenas com configurações no `.zshrc`. A resposta é sim, é bem simples.

O prompt do zsh é controlado pela variável `PS1` ou `PROMPT`. Você pode customizá-lo facilmente com códigos de escape para cores e variáveis especiais do zsh.

content.text:
Sim, é bem simples. O prompt do zsh é só uma variável `PROMPT` (ou `PS1`).

Exemplo básico no `.zshrc`:

```zsh
# Prompt simples: diretório + seta
PROMPT='%F{blue}%~%f → '

# Ou com usuário
PROMPT='%F{green}%n%f:%F{blue}%~%f $ '
```

**Códigos úteis:**
- `%~` = diretório (com `~` para home)
- `%n` = usuário
- `%F{cor}...%f` = cor (blue, green, red, yellow, cyan, magenta)
- `%B...%b` = negrito

**Exemplos de resultado:**

```
~/dev/projeto →           # minimalista
usuario:~/dev $           # clássico
```

Quer que eu remova o Starship e configure um prompt simples no seu `.zshrc`?

# Fish-style path abbreviation
_fish_path() {
  local p=${PWD/#$HOME/\~}
  local parts=(${(s:/:)p})
  local len=${#parts[@]}
  if (( len <= 1 )); then echo "$p"; return; fi
  local result=""
  for (( i=1; i<len; i++ )); do
    local part=${parts[i]}
    if [[ $part == .* ]]; then
      result+="${part:0:2}/"
    else
      result+="${part:0:1}/"
    fi
  done
  echo "${result}${parts[-1]}"
}

# Prompt: nome curto (verde) : path abreviado (azul) $
setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='%F{green}ant%f:%F{blue}$(_fish_path)%f $ '

# Fish-style path abbreviation
_fish_path() {
  local p=${PWD/#$HOME/\~}
  local parts=(${(s:/:)p})
  local len=${#parts[@]}
  if (( len <= 1 )); then echo "$p"; return; fi
  local result=""
  for (( i=1; i<len; i++ )); do
    local part=${parts[i]}
    if [[ $part == .* ]]; then
      result+="${part:0:2}/"
    else
      result+="${part:0:1}/"
    fi
  done
  echo "${result}${parts[-1]}"
}

# Prompt: nome curto (verde) : path abreviado (azul) $
setopt PROMPT_SUBST
PROMPT='%F{green}ant%f:%F{blue}$(_fish_path)%f $ '

pm() {

    fi
    pmNextPath=$(dirname "$pmNextPath")
  done

    fi

}

# overload git command
git () {
    if [[ $1 == "backup" ]]; then
        shift

        # Skip interactive prompts in IDE environment reader
        if [[ -n "$INTELLIJ_ENVIRONMENT_READER" ]]; then
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null "$@"
            return
        fi

        echo -n "Descrição do backup: "
        read description

        if [[ -z "$description" ]]; then
            echo "Erro: descrição é obrigatória."
            return 1
        fi

        local sanitized_description
        sanitized_description=$(echo "$description" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]' | sed 's/[^a-z0-9]/-/g' | sed 's/--*/-/g' | sed 's/^-//' | sed 's/-$//')

        local original_branch
        original_branch=$(command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch --show-current)

        local timestamp
        timestamp=$(date +'%Y-%m-%d-%H-%M-%S')

        local backup_branch="${original_branch}-backup-${sanitized_description}-${timestamp}"

        if [[ -z $(command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null status --porcelain) ]]; then
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch "${backup_branch}"
            echo "Restore point created on clean branch: ${backup_branch}"
        else
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null add .
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null commit -m "backup: ${description}"
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null branch "${backup_branch}"
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null reset --soft HEAD~1
            command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null reset HEAD .
            echo "\nBackup created at: ${backup_branch}"
        fi
    else
        command git -c core.hooksPath=/dev/null "$@"
    fi
}
